name: optimize-pilot
description: Compress your Copilot Chat prompts to save tokens before they are sent to the selected model.

chatParticipants.name: optimize
chatParticipants.description: Compress your prompt to save tokens, then send it to the selected model

promptOptimizer.collapseWhitespace.markdownDescription: Collapse runs of whitespace and excess blank lines (code blocks are preserved).

promptOptimizer.removeFillerWords.markdownDescription: Remove politeness and preamble words (e.g. *please*, *could you*, *thanks*) that carry no instruction.

promptOptimizer.simplifyVerbosePhrases.markdownDescription: Replace wordy phrases with shorter equivalents (e.g. *in order to* → *to*).

promptOptimizer.contractions.markdownDescription: Contract two-word phrases to save tokens (e.g. *do not* → *don't*, *it is* → *it's*).

promptOptimizer.responseBrevity.markdownDescription: Append a short instruction asking the model to answer concisely. This reduces **output** tokens (usually the bulk of a chat's cost), unlike prompt compression which only trims input.

promptOptimizer.brevityInstruction.markdownDescription: Custom text used when `#promptOptimizer.responseBrevity#` is on. Leave empty to use the built-in instruction ("Be concise: answer directly with no preamble…").

promptOptimizer.includeAttachments.markdownDescription: Fold files attached with `#` into the forwarded request. Prose files (`.md`, `.txt`, …) are compressed; source code, JSON, YAML, etc. are preserved byte-for-byte. (Without this, attachments are not forwarded by the participant.)

promptOptimizer.forwardToModel.markdownDescription: After optimizing, send the compressed prompt to the selected model and stream its answer. When off, only the optimized prompt is shown.

promptOptimizer.showSavings.markdownDescription: Show before/after token counts and the percentage saved.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
